elements.text: You have a meeting with your professor. You're not doing well in a class required for your major. You know that your guardian will ask how you are doing in your classes later that night when you talk on the phone. When you think about what your guardian will say to you afterwards, you feel...

elements.name: poor_performance--academics_work_career_development--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
